# Classic vcpkg dependencies for openppp2 Windows CI.
# One package per line.  Add new ports here, then hashFiles() in the workflow
# cache key will pick up the change automatically.
#
# Keep sorted alphabetically (within boost-* / non-boost groups) for stable diffs.

boost-asio
boost-beast
boost-context
boost-coroutine
boost-date-time
boost-filesystem
boost-interprocess
boost-lexical-cast
boost-lockfree
boost-regex
boost-stacktrace
boost-system
boost-thread
boost-uuid
jemalloc
openssl
